mapper.sql: SELECT s.*, c.class_name, u.username FROM students s JOIN classes c ON c.id = s.class_id JOIN users u ON u.id = s.user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO students(user_id, class_id, student_no, name, gender, phone, email) VALUES(#{userId}, #{classId}, #{studentNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{email})
mapper.update: UPDATE students SET user_id=#{userId}, class_id=#{classId}, student_no=#{studentNo}, name=#{name}, gender=#{gender}, phone=#{phone}, email=#{email} WHERE id=#{id}
